notes: Pickleheads' own city page (https://www.pickleheads.com/courts/us/california/san-jose) states 25 locations / 109 courts, broken out as 4 indoor locations / 21 indoor courts and 21 outdoor locations / 88 outdoor courts, with 13 locations having dedicated permanent-line/net pickleball courts. This research confirmed 22 distinct venues by name with individual Pickleheads detail pages (matching the stated indoor breakdown exactly: Ace Pickleball Club San Jose 11 + Central YMCA 2 + Bascom Community Center 2 + Camden Community Center 6 = 21 indoor courts across 4 locations). One of the 22 (Canoas Park) has TWO separate Pickleheads listing pages for the same address (https://www.pickleheads.com/courts/us/california/san-jose/canoas-park and .../canoas-park-san-jose, the latter independently flagged as a '(duplicate)' by a third-party aggregator that mirrors Pickleheads data) which likely accounts for one of Pickleheads' 25 counted 'locations'. That leaves roughly 2 outdoor locations in Pickleheads' count that repeated, targeted WebSearch queries (park names including Kelley, Overfelt, Reid-Hillview, Backesto, Cahill, Watson, Roosevelt, Guadalupe, Almaden Lake, Northside, Hoover, Grant, Emma Prusch, Coyote Creek, Raynor, Meadowfair, Wallenberg, Willow Glen Middle School, Club Volo) could not turn up an actual pickleheads.com detail page for -- those searches returned only third-party aggregator pages or no results, never a pickleheads.com/courts/us/california/san-jose/<slug> URL, so per the 'don't fabricate' rule they are NOT included below. Total outdoor court count across the 18 outdoor venues found here is 80 of the stated 88, consistent with ~1-2 outdoor locations (~8 courts) not identified.

venues.name: Almaden Valley Athletic Club
venues.surface: Outdoor hard courts, dedicated, permanent lines and nets
venues.skill: Clinics beginner through 3.5; open play unrestricted for members
venues.notes: Pickleheads fills in the existing null court count with 8 (matches this task's baseline field being null). Third-party aggregators (Pickleball Union, Global Pickleball Network, TennisPickleballCalifornia) report a different figure (5 dedicated PB courts + separate tennis-line courts) but Pickleheads' own page says 8 outdoor hard courts — used the Pickleheads figure per this research's scope. hours/reservable/skill/bookingUrl carried over unchanged from the existing baseline record (Pickleheads didn't restate them).
